name: sharpclaw
description: SharpClaw editor bridge for VS Code — connects to the SharpClaw backend and handles AI agent tool calls.

sharpclaw.host.description: Hostname or IP address of the SharpClaw backend (default: 127.0.0.1).

sharpclaw.port.description: TCP port the SharpClaw backend listens on (default: 48923).

sharpclaw.apiKeyFilePath.description: Explicit path to the backend runtime API key file. Leave empty to resolve through backend discovery using sharpclaw.backendInstanceId first, then the configured host and port. Environment variables are expanded.

sharpclaw.backendInstanceId.description: Optional backend instance id to attach to explicitly. When set, SharpClaw resolves runtime auth files from the matching backend discovery entry instead of guessing from host and port.

sharpclaw.autoConnect.description: Automatically connect to the SharpClaw backend when VS Code starts.

sharpclaw.autoConnectDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait after VS Code startup before attempting auto-connect. Gives VS Code time to finish loading (default: 3).

sharpclaw.connectionTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for a connection attempt before giving up (default: 10).
